title: Sterling MLD530N 3-inch/76mm 5-Lever Deadlock, Chrome
features: Reversible latch without opening lock case
description: Sterling 5 lever mortice deadlocks offer a high level of security which is further enhanced by an anti-saw deadbolt and an anti-pick curtain. They are suitable for use on most wooden doors and can be used on both left and right hand opening doors. Deadlocks do not require a door handle. The lock is operated from either side of the door via a key. Sterling products are equal to the best in the market and are backed with guarantees of up to 10 years. Sterling is a brand of burger-wächter one of the largest manufactures of security products in the world. Burger-wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, Safes, post boxes and access control solutions.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎2 x Keys, 5 lever Lock, Chrome strike box, Fixings
